code: import React from'react';import{useNavigate,Navigate}from'react-router-dom';import{useAuth}from'../../context/AuthContext';import{jsx as _jsx,jsxs as _jsxs}from"react/jsx-runtime";const Login=()=>{const{login,isAuthenticated}=useAuth();const navigate=useNavigate();if(isAuthenticated){return/*#__PURE__*/_jsx(Navigate,{to:"/bookings",replace:true});}const handleLogin=role=>{if(role==='admin'){login('admin@campus.com','Admin User','ADMIN');}else{login('john@campus.com','John Doe','USER');}navigate('/bookings');};return/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("div",{className:"login-container",children:[/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("h1",{children:"Smart Campus Hub"}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("p",{children:"Select a role to continue"}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("div",{className:"login-buttons",children:[/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("button",{type:"button",onClick:()=>handleLogin('user'),children:"Login as User"}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("button",{type:"button",onClick:()=>handleLogin('admin'),children:"Login as Admin"})]})]});};export default Login;
